containerOverrides.name: hyrelog-api
command:
set -euo pipefail
cd /app/services/api
export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_US"; export SEED_RESET_REGION_LABEL=US; npx --yes tsx prisma/seed-reset.ts
export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_EU"; export SEED_RESET_REGION_LABEL=EU; npx --yes tsx prisma/seed-reset.ts
export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_UK"; export SEED_RESET_REGION_LABEL=UK; npx --yes tsx prisma/seed-reset.ts
export DATABASE_URL="$DATABASE_URL_AU"; export SEED_RESET_REGION_LABEL=AU; npx --yes tsx prisma/seed-reset.ts
echo "API regional reset complete."
